column2: Bois Jacques, Belgium, December 21st, 1944. The 1st Battalion of the 506th surrounds a Volksgrenadier battalion dug in a wooded area. Special rule: all hexes on all boards are Orchards, EXCEPT the East-West road from 6A5 to 2I5 (firebreak, open ground). Wooden buildings on boards 2 and 4 are not considered Orchards.
The American player wins by eliminating all German units by the end of the game.
A Company (turn 1, West edge of boards 6 and 9): 9 Squads, 2 Bazookas, 2 MG. C Company (turn 6, either North or South edge — must be pre-recorded before German set up): 5 Squads, 1 Bazooka, 1 MG.
Set up on any hex on any board, at least 3 whole hexes away from the West edge of boards 6 and 9.
The German player may remove all Decoys at set up to take an additional MG WT.
